* nng_ctx
#+begin_src til
struct nng_ctx {
    mut id : U32
namespace:
    func clone(shallow self: nng_ctx) returns shallow nng_ctx
    func delete(own self: nng_ctx, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func hash(shallow self: nng_ctx, hasher: HashFn) returns shallow U64
    func size() returns shallow U32
}
#+end_src
